1148 Ashley Creek Dr, Matthews, NC 28105, USA
Along 4- mile greenway trail on right and left side. Take right at fork of trail. Access: Public.
224 Matthews Station St, Matthews, NC 28105, USA
Some type of blackberry all up and down the fence next to the railroad tracks. The side by the post office, not the side by the library. Access: Public.
131 W Charles St, Matthews, NC 28105, USA

Nice white fig at Matthews Historical Society. Huge tasty Breba figs ripen very early (first week of June). Looks like it also has a nice main crop. This one is worth taking cuttings to grow in your own yard. Access: Private.
Large pecans over the farmer's market.
217 N Freemont St, Matthews, NC 28105, USA
Pecan trees all around next to this parking lot, nice to pick up off the ground in the fall. Access: Public.
